title: Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-PoE-USBC - PoE adapter for UniFi Protect WiFi cameras
description: Internal cable reduction from Ethernet to USB-C port, which is used for power supply and data transfer and is intended only for the following products from Ubiquiti: UniFi Protect G4 Instant Camera UniFi Protect G4 Doorbell Pro The reduction transforms 48V DC from the Ethernet PoE port to 5V/2A in the USB-C port. It is a good idea to purchase a quality connecting cable with USB-C connectors on both sides for the adapter, which is then connected between the adapter and the camera Reduction
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces USB-C ports 1 LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 48V DC Output Voltage [V] 5 Output Current [A] 2
